autoSave.storageFullDesc: The diagram is too large to save locally. Save to cloud to preserve your work.

limits.toolbarLockedUnsaved: Diagram limit reached. Upgrade your plan to save and continue editing.

upgrade.checkoutError: Could not open checkout. Please try again.

proFeatures.allFormats: All export formats (PNG, SVG, Mermaid, JSON)

account.title: My Account
account.avatarInvalidType: Invalid format. Use JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF.
account.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your diagrams, workspaces, and data will be permanently deleted.
account.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

hero.headline: Design microservices architectures visually
hero.sub: Create professional diagrams with drag-and-drop, real-time collaboration, and export to PNG, SVG, Mermaid and JSON. No install needed.

nodes.title: Four specialized node types
nodes.subtitle: Each type with specific behaviors and connections

items.name: Microservice
items.desc: Independent services with embedded databases and internal libraries

items.name: Database
items.desc: 8 variants: Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB and more

items.name: Queue/Messaging
items.desc: IBM MQ, Kafka and RabbitMQ with dashed connections

items.name: External System
items.desc: External APIs: REST, gRPC, GraphQL, WebSocket, HTTPS

items.heading: Drag-and-Drop Visual Editor
items.desc: Interactive canvas with zoom, pan, minimap, snap-guides and snap grid. Smart auto-layout.

items.heading: Protocol Connections
items.desc: 11 visual protocols with distinct colors. Editable orthogonal connections with protocol labels.

items.heading: Undo/Redo + Auto-save
items.desc: 50 history states with Ctrl+Z. Auto-save every 1.5s with gzip compression in IndexedDB.

items.heading: Professional Export
items.desc: PNG, SVG, Mermaid and JSON. Import back with Zod validation. Share with public link.

protocols.title: 11 supported protocols
protocols.sub: Visually distinct colors for synchronous and asynchronous

items.name: AES-256-GCM
items.desc: All diagrams encrypted before reaching the database

items.name: Row Level Security
items.desc: Granular access policies in PostgreSQL via Supabase RLS

items.name: Zod Validation
items.desc: All inputs validated with strict schema before persisting

items.name: Strict CSP
items.desc: Content Security Policy configured in HTML to block XSS

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Sign up with email and password. Access immediately after login.

steps.title: Build your diagram
steps.desc: Drag nodes, connect services, define protocols. Auto-layout available.

steps.title: Share and export
steps.desc: Share with colleagues, export to PNG, SVG, Mermaid or JSON.

finalCta.headline: Ready to visualize your architecture?
finalCta.sub: Start free today. No credit card required.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.noWorkspaceDesc: The Team plan lets you create a shared workspace for your team.
workspace.inviteLinkDesc: This email doesn't have an account yet. Share the link below with the invitee:
workspace.inviteAcceptedDesc: You've been added to the workspace. Redirecting...
workspace.removeDesc: Are you sure you want to remove {{email}} from the workspace?

unsavedDialog.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedDialog.description: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before leaving?

integrity.hashMismatch: The integrity hash of this diagram does not match. Data may have been modified outside the normal flow.
